title: phlegmariurus monticola
intro: Phlegmariurus monticola, also known as the mountain resurrection fern, is a species of plant in the lycopodiaceae family, characterized by its ability to regrow and thrive in challenging environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus monticola are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusion or decoction, often used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety need further scientific investigation.
